description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a manicured lawn and several trees. The building features a low-pitched, gable roof and a symmetrical facade with a central entrance. The front yard is landscaped with pathways leading to the entrance and flanked by bushes and trees, giving it a suburban residential feel. The windows are evenly spaced along the front and sides, contributing to a balanced and orderly appearance. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or painted siding, with a shingled roof. The property is set on a raised platform, suggesting a clear boundary between the house and its surroundings.
description: A single-story, rectangular bungalow with a gable roof, symmetrical facade, and landscaped front yard with trees and pathways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and dense landscaping with trees and bushes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated shape of the bungalow, side windows, and the expanse of the lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear view of the backyard, additional trees, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance path, side windows, and the continuation of the landscaped yard.
